channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x600x54mm Road closure On bridge (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drainage under pavement causing damage to property, 27th March
item.description:
Both sides of number 44

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-44, Saint Georges Drive, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 27th March
item.description:
Abrupt level differences FW 1000x4000x45mm Standard TM Temp FW closure STATS (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bags of rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Several black plastic bags of rubbish just behind the lay by/passing place on the left when travelling from Syreford to Whittington

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 27th March
item.description:
Cway edge kerb 3 x 6x4 edge kerb- Take up and lay new STAT PLAN REQUIRED Standard TM required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 27th March
item.description:
Cway edge kerb 1 x 6x4 edging kerb LAY NEW STAT PLAN REQUIRED Standard TM required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb subsidence, 27th March
item.description:
Kerb subsidence outside number 3 Hillcourt Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, The Spinney, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 27th March
item.description:
Cway Edge kerb 1 x 6x4 edging kerb 1 x quadrant kerb Take up and relay STAT PLAN REQUIRED Standard TM required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)

item.title: Road sign left on verge, 27th March
item.description:
Towards cleeve on verge discarded sign about 50 yards before old farmers arms pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 27th March
item.description:
Missing Give Way Sign. Sign should be attached above street name plate, to street lamp column no. 1 at junction.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)
